title: BloodMagic: Teams
description: BloodMagic Teams - Integrates FTB Teams with BloodMagic. Allows players to bind blood orbs and items to their team instead of personally, so teammates can share LP networks and use each other's bound items.
body:
# Blood Magic Teams

**Share your Blood Magic network with your teammates!**

Blood Magic Teams is an addon mod that bridges [Blood Magic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-magic) and [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge), allowing players to bind their blood orbs, daggers, and other bindable items to their team instead of themselves personally.

*IMPORTANT* - This project required FTB Teams to function, you will be responsible for obtaining this mod, it's NOT included

---

## Features

### Team Binding

When you right-click an unbound Blood Magic item while on a team, you'll be presented with a choice:

- **Personal Binding** - Works exactly like vanilla Blood Magic (bound to you only)
- **Team Binding** - Binds the item to your entire team's shared LP network

### Shared LP Network

Items bound to a team can be used by any team member! This means:

- Teammates can use each other's bound blood orbs
- Sacrificial daggers can fill a shared pool
- All team members benefit from LP generation

### Remember My Choice

Don't want to see the popup every time? Check "Don't ask again" and your preference will be saved. You can always change it later with commands.

---

## Commands

`/bloodmagicteams` - Main command with subcommands:

- `/bloodmagicteams preference [personal|team]` - Set your default binding preference
- `/bloodmagicteams preference reset` - Clear saved preference and ask again
- `/bloodmagicteams status` - View your current binding settings
- These are convenience commands only, the UI handles all of this for you normally.

---

## Configuration

All features can be configured in the config file:

- Enable/disable team binding functionality
- Show/hide the binding selection UI
- Team leaders can restrict team binding via FTB Teams properties

---

## FAQ

**Q: What happens if I leave my team?**
A: Items bound to your old team will no longer work for you. You'll need to rebind them.

**Q: Can I convert a personal-bound item to team-bound?**
A: No, bindings are permanent. You'll need a new item to bind to your team.

**Q: Does this work with all Blood Magic items?**
A: Yes! Any item that implements Blood Magic's binding system (orbs, daggers, sigils, etc.) will work with team binding. Should also work for addon mods.

---

## For Modpack Makers

This mod is open for inclusion in any modpack. No need to ask permission!

---

*Perfect for multiplayer servers, SMP groups, and anyone who wants to share the blood magic experience with friends!*
